request_payload.exposure_text: Remember when we had real civil defense drills? Those were the days when we took preparedness seriously. Now, the government wants to cut funding for local emergency response teams. They say it's about 'budget priorities,' but we all know what that really means. Our communities deserve better. #StandUpForPreparedness #NationalSecurityFirst
